name: MoDeX — Memory of Codex
description: Shared reasoning memory for engineering teams using AI coding agents. Fivetran syncs engineering data (GitHub, Jira, Slack, Sheets) into BigQuery. Seven specialized agents turn raw data into queryable team memory with full provenance and governance.

skills.name: Shared Memory Query
skills.description: Search team decisions, code history, architecture choices, and rejected paths across all synced engineering data sources.

skills.name: Data Source Sync
skills.description: Operate Fivetran pipelines to sync engineering data (GitHub, Sheets, Jira, Slack) into the shared memory warehouse.

skills.name: Decision Provenance
skills.description: Trace the origin and freshness of every piece of shared memory — which source, which sync, which developer, when.

skills.name: Knowledge Structuring
skills.description: Transform raw engineering data into structured decision records and team analytics via Fivetran dbt Core transformations.

skills.name: Team Broadcast
skills.description: Push decision summaries, progress reports, and alerts to Cloud Storage, Google Sheets, or Slack/Teams webhooks.

skills.name: Access Governance
skills.description: Human-in-the-loop safety gate for all write operations. Ensures sensitive engineering context is shared with proper governance.
